title: Analyze Uncaught Exceptions & Unhandled Rejections
description: Analyze the lifecycle and implications of uncaught exceptions and unhandled promise rejections in Node.js. Design robust top-level error handlers to prevent process instability. Implement observability strategies for uncaught errors to maintain application health.
objectives: Analyze the lifecycle and implications of uncaught exceptions and unhandled promise rejections in Node.js.
Design robust top-level error handlers to prevent process instability.
Implement observability strategies for uncaught errors to maintain application health.
